trending_videos.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Produced by:      
Kevin Feige, p.g.a.
Amy Pascal, p.g.a.   
Avi Arad
Rachel O'Connor, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Louis D'Esposito 
David Cain

Cast:  
Tom Holland

popular_content_themes.total_views_estimate: High engagement due to multiple related videos
popular_content_themes.insights: The Spider-Man franchise is generating significant interest, likely driven by a new release or update. This trend is reflected in multiple videos focusing on trailers and breakdowns, indicating strong audience engagement with both primary content and detailed analyses.

Content related to video game releases, such as Grand Theft Auto VI and Street Fighter 6, are trending. This suggests high audience engagement with gaming communities and interest in new game announcements.
The presence of an official music video ('JUMP INA CROWD') indicates potential for music content to trend, especially if paired with unique or popular genres.

content_formats.insights: Trailers and teasers are highly effective in capturing audience attention, especially when tied to popular franchises like Spider-Man and new seasons of established shows like Outer Banks.
Viewers show strong interest in detailed content analyses, particularly for complex or layered content that benefits from expert breakdowns, such as movie trailers and gaming content.
Gameplay and challenge videos maintain their popularity, appealing to gaming communities interested in both entertainment and skill demonstration.

top_creators.insights: High potential for further engagement through exclusive content and behind-the-scenes features, especially leveraging popular franchises.
Strong niche in content breakdowns, suggesting opportunities to expand into similar detailed analyses of other trending media.
Known for high-impact announcements, indicating potential to capitalize on pre-release content and community engagement.

emerging_trends.insights: Opportunities exist to create content that spans multiple media forms, such as integrating game elements into movie marketing or vice versa.
Growth in interest for interactive or immersive content experiences, particularly those that involve audience participation or gamification elements.

audience_engagement.insight: Engage audiences through serialized content that builds anticipation, such as episodic breakdowns or sequenced trailers.
Leverage community-driven content, encouraging viewer interaction and feedback, especially in gaming and analysis niches.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
